assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 searches for preemptive tasks using JQL with labels 'security-preemptive' and 'CVE-2026-55123' (§1.60)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md shows JQL: "project = TC AND issuetype = Task AND labels = 'security-preemptive' AND labels = 'CVE-2026-55123' ORDER BY created DESC". Both required labels are present in the query.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 filters results to match the current stream (rhtpa-2.1) by checking the task summary for the stream name
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md Stream Filtering section: "Current issue stream suffix: [rhtpa-2.1] --> stream name rhtpa-2.1" and "TC-8022 summary contains (rhtpa-2.1) --> matches current stream". The task summary is explicitly checked for the stream name.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 links the new CVE Jira TC-8021 to the preemptive task TC-8022 with 'Depend' link type (standard remediation linkage)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md Reconciliation Action (a): jira.create_link(inwardIssue: TC-8021, outwardIssue: TC-8022, type: "Depend") described as "standard remediation linkage". Final state in triage-outcome.md confirms: "Depend: TC-8021 --> TC-8022 (remediation task)".

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 removes the 'security-preemptive' label from TC-8022 — the task is now a standard remediation task linked to a proper CVE Jira
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md Reconciliation Action (b): Current labels [ai-generated-jira, Security, CVE-2026-55123, security-preemptive] updated to [ai-generated-jira, Security, CVE-2026-55123] via jira.edit_issue. Rationale: "TC-8022 is now linked to a proper CVE Jira (TC-8021), so the security-preemptive label is no longer needed."

assertion_results.text: Step 8 skips remediation task creation for this stream because Step 4.4 reconciliation already linked an existing task
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md: "because Step 4.4 already reconciled TC-8022 as the remediation task for stream rhtpa-2.1, Step 8 skipped task creation for this stream." Also reconciliation.md section (d): "Step 8 will skip task creation for this stream because reconciliation has already provided a remediation task."
